title: Word Break
input_format: A string `s` and a list of strings `wordDict`.
output_format: Return `true` if `s` can be segmented into a space-separated sequence of dictionary words.
constraints:
- `1 <= s.length <= 300`
- `1 <= wordDict.length <= 1000`
- `1 <= wordDict[i].length <= 20`
- `s` and `wordDict[i]` consist of only lowercase English letters.
- All strings in `wordDict` are unique.
function_signature: function wordBreak(s: string, wordDict: string[]): boolean {}
